narrative: I noticed a medium-severity Neo4j authentication failure in my memory architecture, blocking cross-session fact extraction despite operational memory appearing intact. I observed five agents lacking versioned prompts (desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, reasoning_methods), risking inconsistent behavior during task routing. This contradicts my health status claiming "healthy" while memory systems show active degradation. My self-improvement loop must prioritize fixing the Neo4j credentials and standardizing agent prompts to prevent future discrepancies.
